title: Junior Investment Banker at IIFL Finance International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at IIFL Finance International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, IIFL Finance International Enterprises in Nashik is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About IIFL Finance International Enterprises:
IIFL Finance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance International Enterprises!
